Tests for regression issue 652 in the JerryScript engine using eval and division operations.

# Purpose
This code is a test suite that evaluates JavaScript expressions using the `eval` function to ensure they execute without errors. It contains three `try-catch` blocks, each attempting to evaluate a different expression. The first expression divides the global object `this` by 10. The second expression increments a variable `v_0` initialized to 10 and divides it by 1. The third expression checks a condition using the incremented variable `v_0` in an `if` statement. If any of these expressions throw an error, the `catch` block will execute an `assert` statement with `false`, indicating a failure in the test.
